'''Jarril''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who frequented the [[Smuggler's Run/Legends|Smuggler's Run]] and was an acquaintance of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. He met with him on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in the [[Crystal Jewel]] Casino. Jarril was the owner of the ''[[Spicy Lady]]'', which he designed after the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]. He was killed in [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]].
